change_email_html:
You have requested to change the e-mail address associated with your Leek Wars account.

To confirm this change, click on this validation link.

This link is valid for 24 hours and can only be used once. If you did not request this change, simply ignore this message and your current address will remain unchanged.

For security reasons, take a couple of seconds to check that the URL starts with leekwars.com before clicking.

See you soon in the garden!
change_email_text: To change your email address, click on this link: %s.
group_invite_html:
%1$s invites you to join a private group on Leek Wars, the game where you make leeks fight using code you wrote yourself.

To accept the invitation and create your leek, click on this link: %2$s

This link is valid for 1 hour. Once logged in, you'll be able to write your leek's AI, train it against other group members, take part in internal tournaments and progress at your own pace.

Leek Wars blends programming practice and strategic competition: it's up to you to code the smartest leek in the group!

Have fun, and see you in the garden!
group_invite_subject: %1$s invites you to play Leek Wars
group_invite_text: %1$s invites you to play Leek Wars, click on the link to log in: %2$s (link valid for 1 hour).
mail_changelog_changelog: Email when an update is released
no_answer: This email was sent automatically. Please do not reply.
register_mail:
Congratulations %s, you are now registered on Leek Wars.

Go to this page to validate your account: %s

By validating your account, you unlock:
- 20 additional fights
- A box of 10,000 Habs
- 50 crystals
- The Cap hat
register_mail_html:
Congratulations %s, your account has just been created on Leek Wars, the game where you make leeks fight using code you wrote yourself.

To finalize your registration and unlock the full game, click the button below. It only takes a second, and you immediately receive several rewards to kickstart your adventure:

🎯 20 extra fights per day to train your leek faster
📦 A box of 10,000 Habs, the in-game currency, to buy weapons and chips
💎 50 crystals to customize your leek
🧢 The Cap hat, a collector accessory reserved for verified accounts

%s

If you did not request this registration, simply ignore this message: no account will be activated unless you click the validation button yourself.

See you soon in the garden!
register_mail_subject: 🎁 Activate your Leek Wars account and claim your starter kit
reset_mail:
Hello %s!
Your password reset request has been registered.

To reset your password, visit this link: %s.
reset_mail_html:
Hello %s!

You have requested to reset your password on Leek Wars. To choose a new password, click on this secure link.

This link is valid for 24 hours and can only be used once. If you did not request this reset, simply ignore this message: your current password stays unchanged and nobody else can access your account unless you click the link yourself.

For your security, pick a password that's different from the ones you use on other sites, and consider enabling two-factor authentication from your settings if you haven't already.

See you soon in the garden!
unsubscribe_message: You have been unsubscribed from the email list {0}.
unsubscribe_sentence: If you no longer wish to receive emails from the list {0} ({1}), you can {2}.
